case_title: ARTHUR ALLIONE VS. ALEX FITNESS, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,680.00 FILED BY ALLIONE, ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT ALEX FITNESS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2022 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. FILED BY ALLIONE, ARTHUR ALEX FITNESS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ALLIONE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX FITNESS, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY OLGA COLINS (OWNER) AND NIKITA KALASHNIKOV (OPERATIONS MANAGER). DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) OLGA COLLINS, OWNER. FILED BY DEFENDANT ALEX FITNESS, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-13-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEX FITNESS, LLC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIONE, ARTHUR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALEX FITNESS, LLC DEFENDANT ACTED APPROPIRATELY GIVEN DECLINED CHARGE. PLAINTIFF'S FUTURE DAMAGES ARE SPECULATIVE IN ANY EVENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
